title: Crispy Beef Larb Wrap
description: A twist on traditional Indian street food, this crispy beef larb wrap combines the flavors of Thailand with the spices of India.

ingredients.name: Larb Beef
ingredients.notes: ground beef mixed with Thai spices

ingredients.name: Crispy Onions
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced onions fried until crispy

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the crispy onions and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the larb beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the roasted cumin powder, garam masala, and salt, and stir to combine.
Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the beef mixture onto the bottom half of the wrap, followed by a dollop of raita, some chopped cilantro, and a few slices of green chili.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
